OCTOBER 15-17, 2026
Horizon Convention Center, TechCity, Utopolis

NEXT-GEN AI
SUMMIT

Join leading artificial intelligence innovators, data scientists, and machine learning engineers at the premier global tech conference. Secure your access to explore next-generation generative AI models, deep learning strategy, and exclusive industry networking.

Secure Early Bird Tickets

Our Sponsors

Speakers

Gain unmatched tactical blueprints from the world's leading artificial intelligence researchers, neural network architects, and ethical tech governance pioneers.

Explore Full Lineup

Advanced AI Technologies

Get hands-on exposure to breakthrough technical developments shaping modern enterprise infrastructure. Master scalable Large Language Models (LLMs), predictive computer vision arrays, multimodal transformers, and production-ready automated agent vector pipelines.

Networking Opportunities

Bridge the gap between research and deployment. Engage in dedicated peer-to-peer technical panels, structured founder roundtable lunches, and targeted VC matchmaking spaces explicitly curated to build high-value strategic tech partnerships.

AGENDA

October 15-17, 2052 | Horizon
Convention Center, Amesterdam

  • Day 1 09:00 - 19:00

    Foundations of Generative AI & Large Language Models

    Kick off the summit with deep-dives into baseline transformer architectures. Learn cutting-edge optimization techniques for open-source LLMs, custom weight tuning strategies, and enterprise deployment frameworks for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

  • Day 2 09:00 - 20:00

    Enterprise AI Infrastructure & Scalable MLOps

    Shift the focus to operationalizing artificial intelligence at scale. Industry engineers dissect high-throughput machine learning operations (MLOps), real-time vector database query performance, and secure enterprise data handling layers.

  • Day 3 09:00 - 16:00

    The Autonomous Agent Future & Executive Networking

    Conclude with tactical panels evaluating multi-agent orchestration frameworks and next-decade technology trends. Wrap up the conference by establishing strategic relationships during the formal B2B executive partnership mixer.
